questions.question: What blanketed Tokyo with six inches of ash when it blew its top in 1707?
What "Voice" was stilled in the wee hours of the evening on May 14, 1998?
Who did activist Jody Williams call a "weenie" for not signing an international treaty against land mines?
What elementary particle's antiparticle is the positron?
Who, in 1997, became the first pitcher since 1945 to lead either league in wins, strikeouts and ERA?
What U.S. cartoonist was famous for intricate multistep solutions to simple problems?
